name: PersonaTrail: Benchmarking Personalized Web Agents through Browsing Trails

description: arXiv:2607.20482v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Recent advances in large language models have enabled web agents to autonomously execute complex tasks. In practice, users frequently provide underspecified instructions, requiring agents to infer the missing context from their raw browsing histories. Existing benchmarks fail to capture this form of personalization, as they either restrict tasks t...
author: Seungbin Yang, Chaewoon Ki, Dohyun Lee, Jaegul Choo, ChaeHun Park
